name: Peter Pumpkin Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix pumpkin, eggs, sugar, milk, and seasonings in a bowl until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9x13-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the white cake mix over the top of the batter and push it down gently so it's evenly distributed, but do not mix.
5. Drizzle melted butter over the top of the layer.
6. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the top.
7. Bake for 45-60 minutes until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm or cold with whipped topping if desired.
